item.title: Neighbour Quarrel Turned FATAL!
item.description: On May 10, 2024, in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Jason King (55) stabbed his neighbour Alistair Mahwuto (63) during a longstanding dispute—wounding him in the stomach with what was described as a small lock-knife. The injury, while not fatal, could have been serious if a few centimetres higher... What are you guys' thoughts on this insanity of a case?

media:content.media:title: Neighbour Quarrel Turned FATAL!
media:content.media:description: On May 10, 2024, in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Jason King (55) stabbed his neighbour Alistair Mahwuto (63) during a longstanding dispute—wounding him in the stomach with what was described as a small lock-knife. The injury, while not fatal, could have been serious if a few centimetres higher... What are you guys' thoughts on this insanity of a case?

item.title: Shafilea Ahmed: They Did This to Their Daughter for "HONOUR"
